text: Every commercial motor carrier shall make an investigation and inquiry of each commercial driver it hires on and after the effective date of this article in accordance with rules and regulations of the commissioner of transportation.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 5
#### Article 19
##### § 509-R — Investigations and inquiries

Every commercial motor carrier shall make an investigation and inquiry of each commercial driver it hires on and after the effective date of this article in accordance with rules and regulations of the commissioner of transportation.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
